docstrings.NullCookieJar.extract_cookies: Extract cookies from the response for the given request.
docstrings.NullCookieJar.set_cookie: Set a cookie in the jar.
docstrings.get_dataloss_msg: Generate a message indicating data loss for the given url.
docstrings.get_maxsize_msg: Generate a message when the size exceeds the limit for the request, noting if the size was expected.
docstrings.get_warnsize_msg: Generate a message when the size exceeds the limit for the request, noting if the size was expected.
docstrings.make_response: Create a response object using url, status, headers, body, flags, certificate, ip_address, protocol, and stop_download.
docstrings.normalize_bind_address: Normalize the bind address value into a tuple of string and integer.
